violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off to burn the ice at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized and picture has been sent to inspector. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Walk-in #2 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

-The floor seal in the kitchen area is in poor repair -Multiple ceiling tiles in the kitchen are in poor repair The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items such as dish machine and cooking equipment were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
